summary: Comprehensive testing of Iteration 7 features: @mention system, screenshot polling, pin link sharing, delete pin, member avatars, sidebar width, relative dates, guest access, and file attachments. Fixed GuestPinCreate model missing canvas_width/canvas_height fields.

bugs_fixed_during_testing.issue: GuestPinCreate model missing canvas_width and canvas_height fields, causing 500 error on guest pin creation
bugs_fixed_during_testing.fix: Added canvas_width: Optional[int] = None and canvas_height: Optional[int] = None to GuestPinCreate model

mention_system.backend: GET /api/projects/{project_id}/members returns unique commenters with name and type
mention_system.frontend: filteredMentionUsers builds from allComments+pins+projectUsers, dropdown triggers on @

screenshot_polling.frontend: pollScreenshot polls every 2s, shows Capturing... spinner then View Screenshot button

pin_link_sharing.backend: Pin IDs available via pins endpoint
pin_link_sharing.frontend: handleSharePin copies URL with ?pin=xxx, useSearchParams auto-selects pin from URL

member_avatars.frontend: 2-letter initials (first 2 words) displayed with hover title for full name

delete_pin.frontend: Trash2 icon in thread view, confirm dialog before delete

relative_dates.verified: dayjs fromNow() showing 'a few seconds ago', 'X minutes ago' format

guest_access.frontend: Guest sees Login button, can view project and pins

file_attachment.frontend: Attachment links displayed in comments with Paperclip icon

critical_code_review_comments: ESLint warnings in ProjectCanvas.js for missing dependencies in useCallback hooks (lines 463, 572) - non-blocking
seed_data_creation: Created test pins and comments during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All P0 and P1 features from iteration 7 are working. GuestPinCreate bug was fixed (missing canvas_width/canvas_height). @mention dropdown triggers on typing '@' followed by text. Pin link sharing via ?pin=xxx query param auto-opens thread. Super Admin dashboard still uses MOCKED static data.
